OtherDirectionsOption.Description: THE DISTRICT JUDGE HAS ORDERED THE DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE A LIST OF CREDITORS. THE COURT WILL INFORM YOU IF IT PROPOSES TO MAKE AN ADMINISTRATION ORDER.
IF YOU DISAGREE WITH THE DEFENDANT'S STATEMENT, WRITE TO THE COURT, STATING WHY YOU OBJECT, WITHIN SIXTEEN DAYS OF THE DATE OF THE POSTMARK. THE COURT WILL ARRANGE A HEARING.

IF YOU DISAGREE WITH THE DEFENDANT'S STATEMENT, WRITE TO THE COURT, STATING WHY YOU OBJECT, WITHIN SIXTEEN DAYS OF THE DATE OF THE POSTMARK. THE COURT WILL ARRANGE A HEARING.THE DEFENDANT HAS OFFERED TO PAY <ENTER AMOUNT PER PAYMENT_PERIOD>. UNLESS YOU OBJECT TO THE RATE OF REPAYMENT, THE COURT WILL MAKE A VARIED ORDER.IF YOU OBJECT TO THE RATE OF REPAYMENT, WRITE TO THE COURT, WITHIN SIXTEEN DAYS OF THE DATE OF THE POSTMARK. THE COURT WILL THEN DETERMINE THE RATE OF REPAYMENT.
